---
applyTo: "**"
description: "Use when working in this repository to maintain a lightweight project memory log with verified outcomes."
---

# Project Memory Rule

Before substantial edits, read [docs/project-memory.md](docs/project-memory.md).

After every completed task, append a short entry to [docs/project-memory.md](docs/project-memory.md) with:
- date
- task/issue id
- files changed
- behavior change summary
- tests run and result
- open risks/follow-ups

Rules:
- Keep entries concise and factual.
- Do not include secrets or tokens.
- Prefer bullets over long prose.
- If no edits were made, log "No file edits".
- If no tests were run, log "No tests run".
